name: MetaGPT
description: Multi-agent framework where AI agents role-play as engineers, PMs, and QA to collectively produce software from a single natural language prompt via structured workflows.

skills.name: Role Assignment
skills.description: Assign specialized agent roles — engineer, PM, QA — collaborating via structured message passing

skills.name: Code Generation
skills.description: Generate full codebases from natural language including tests, docs, and CI configuration

skills.name: Software Planning
skills.description: Produce PRD, system design, and task breakdown automatically before writing any code

skills.name: Incremental Dev
skills.description: Iteratively add features to existing codebases with change-aware context management

skills.name: CLI Runner
skills.description: Run multi-agent software development sessions from the terminal with a single command
